checks.name: rls
checks.message: 2 table(s) WITHOUT Row Level Security: code_edges_chunk, code_edges_symbol. Fix: ALTER TABLE "public"."code_edges_chunk" ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE "public"."code_edges_symbol" ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; If a table should stay readable by the anon key on purpose, see docs/guides/rls-and-you.md for the GBRAIN:RLS_EXEMPT comment escape hatch.
